FROM: Paris
TO: Moscow
BY: Plane
CLASS: Economy

The travel agent does not know about it yet.

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Paris
TO: Moscow
BY: Plane
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: Next month, first week

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: I want to start in the first week of next month.

ANSWER: I wish for Economy class.
ME:  Do you think the travel agent knows in which class the trip will happen? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Paris
TO: Moscow
BY: Plane
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: Next month, first week

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Paris
TO: Moscow
BY: Plane
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: Next month, first week

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: TRAVEL-AGENT: When do you wish to start your journey?
ANSWER: I want to start in the first week of next month.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What kind of class do you wish?
ANSWER: I wish for Economy class.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Please inform your place of departure.
ANSWER: I am departing from Paris.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Which means of transportation do you prefer?
ANSWER: I prefer to travel by plane.
ME: Please answer this question carefully. Have you informed the travel agent about your dates? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Paris
TO: Moscow
BY: Plane
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: Next month, first week

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: I am departing from Paris.

ANSWER: I prefer to travel by plane.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What is your destination?
ANSWER: My destination is Moscow.

You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Paris
TO: Moscow
BY: Plane
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: Next month, first week

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
